items.name: M4 Sherman
items.extraction_note: American medium tank baseline; reliable, versatile, and doctrine-centered on combined arms.

items.name: Sherman DD
items.extraction_note: Amphibious Sherman variant; rough seas and launch decisions determine whether it reaches the beach.

items.name: Panther tank
items.extraction_note: Long-range threat vehicle with reliability issues and strong open-country performance.

items.name: Panzer IV
items.extraction_note: Common German medium tank baseline in Normandy and breakout actions.

items.name: M3 half-track
items.extraction_note: Armored infantry transport with open-top vulnerability and strong mobility.

items.name: M36 tank destroyer
items.extraction_note: Open-topped 90mm anti-armor vehicle tied to evolving tank-destroyer doctrine.

items.name: Cromwell tank
items.extraction_note: British cruiser tank with speed and low profile but weaker frontal gun utility against heavy armor.
